# LEZAC contact-scanner runtime oracle fixture v1
# Synthetic parser fixture: verifies transcript parsing and address anchors only.
capture=contact_scanner_runtime
source=dosbox-debug
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
scenario=monster_contact_damage_live
level=1
command=dosbox-debug -c "mount c /tmp/lezac-dosbox-contact-scanner" -c "c:" -c "DEBUG LEZAC.EXE"

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C

break ghidra=1000:5CB0 runtime=1A2B:5CB0 label=contact_scanner_start
break ghidra=1000:604F runtime=1A2B:604F label=contact_scanner_end

subject_actor slot=0 kind=0 state=0 x=0x0068 y=0x00a8 w=16 h=24 flags=0x0000
other_actor slot=1 kind=1 state=0 x=0x0070 y=0x00aa w=16 h=16 flags=0x0000
contact_scan subject_slot=0 other_slot=1 flags_before=0x0000 flags_after=0x0003 contact=1 player_contact=1 monster_contact=1 object_contact=0 damage_pending=2 overlap_x=8 overlap_y=14

dump DS:7900
2B3C:7900  00 00 00 00 68 00 a8 00 10 18 00 00 03 00 02 00
